content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Assigning to Classes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1300/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum number of classes that can be assigned.

solution.approach: Sort the array and assign classes based on the smallest available class

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n, k = map(int, input().split())
    arr = sorted(map(int, input().split()))
    classes = 1
    last = arr[0]
    for i in range(1, n):
        if arr[i] - last > k:
            classes += 1
            last = arr[i]
    print(classes)
